findings.description: The knowledge file describes PermissionUtil with its full class name `nablarch.common.permission.PermissionUtil`, but the source file only refers to `PermissionUtil` (without a package qualifier) in the code comment. The full class name `nablarch.common.permission.PermissionUtil` does not appear anywhere in the source file.
findings.source_evidence: Source code comment: `// PermissionUtil„Āč„āČPermission„āíŚŹĖŚĺó„Āô„āč` and `Permission permission = PermissionUtil.getPermission();` ‚ÄĒ no package name given.
